questions.question: What is a spice?
questions.correct_answer: Any seed, fruit, root, bark, leaf or part of a plant used for taste and color

questions.question: What are the three spices you use at home?
questions.correct_answer: Answer will vary (e.g. Turmeric, Fenugreek, Cumin seeds)

questions.question: How many pictures of spices were given in the content?
What is turmeric called in English?
What does turmeric help with?
questions.correct_answer: Improving energy level, digestion, reducing body pain

questions.question: How do you use methi seeds to control sugar and weight?
questions.correct_answer: Soak overnight and drink water in the morning

questions.question: How does heeng help with gas in the tummy?
questions.correct_answer: Gives relief when put on the tummy

questions.question: What do dalchini and laung give relief from?
Who shared home remedies with Vikram and Vaibhavi?

notes.title: Definition of Spice
notes.content: Any seed, fruit, root, bark, leaf or part of a plant used for taste and color

notes.title: Turmeric Benefits
notes.content: Improves energy level, digestion, reduces body pain

notes.title: Methi Uses
notes.content: Controls sugar and weight by soaking seeds overnight and drinking water in the morning

notes.title: Jeera Benefits
notes.content: Improves digestion and helps with sleeplessness when soaked in water overnight

notes.title: Heeng Uses
notes.content: Gives relief from gas in the tummy, cough and cold

notes.title: Dalchini and Laung Benefits
notes.content: Give relief from toothache till consulting a dentist

notes.title: Home Remedies
notes.content: Shared by grandmother with Vikram and Vaibhavi

notes.title: Other Uses of Spices
notes.content: Used for cooking and home remedies

notes.title: Important Spices at Home
notes.content: Turmeric, Fenugreek, Cumin seeds, Asafoetida (Heeng), Cinnamon (Dalchini), Clove (Laung)

facts.fact: Spices are used for taste and color in food
Turmeric is also known as Haldi in English
Methi seeds can help control sugar and weight when soaked overnight
Jeera (Cumin) seeds improve digestion and help with sleeplessness
Heeng (Asafoetida) gives relief from gas in the tummy, cough and cold
Dalchini (Cinnamon) and Laung (Clove) give relief from toothache till consulting a dentist
Home remedies are shared by grandparents with children
Spices have multiple uses beyond cooking, including home remedies
Turmeric has multiple benefits, including improving energy level and digestion
Methi seeds can be used to control sugar and weight when soaked overnight
